title: Searching for problems by topic or keywords
content: Use the 'searchProblems' method to discover relevant problem IDs when you have a topic or keyword in mind but not a specific ID. Specify the 'subject' and a 'query' string of at least 3 characters. You can use 'limit' to control the number of results returned.
examples: Find me problems about quadratic equations in math.
Search for chemistry problems involving oxidation reactions.
List 10 problems related to Newton's laws in physics.
